title: Thiourea and its Organic Derivatives. Part III. Oxidimetric Determiation with Diethylene Tetra-ammonium Sulphatocerate (DTS)
author: Balwant Singh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Diethylene tetra-ammonium sulphatorerate (DTS) has been used as a redox reagent for visual and pot­entiometric determination of thiourea and its several alkyl and aryl derivatives in sulphuric acid medium. In visual methods, ferroin and amylose have been used as indicators.
steps_raw: Diethylene tetra-ammonium sulphatorerate (DTS) has been used as a redox reagent for visual and pot­entiometric determination of thiourea and its several alkyl and aryl derivatives in sulphuric acid medium. In visual methods, ferroin and amylose have been used as indicators.
